# rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337

Self-contained R replication package for:

> Geissler, Hartmann, Humphreys, Klüver, and Giesecke (2022). *Public
> support for global vaccine sharing in the COVID-19 pandemic: Evidence
> from Germany.* PLOS ONE.
> [doi:10.1371/journal.pone.0278337](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0278337)

Source analysis repository:
[wzb-ipi/vaccine_solidarity](https://github.com/wzb-ipi/vaccine_solidarity)

## Layout

    rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/
      replication.yml          # edit here; copied to inst/ by sync script
      data/                    # wave4_conjoint, wave2_survey, vignette_labels (.rda)
      data-raw/                # CSV sources + build/sync scripts
      R/                       # canonical package source (edit these files)
        helpers.R              # shared helpers
        prep_data.R            # rebuild analysis data from combined.csv
        prep_data_tab_2.R      # conjoint reshape for Table 2
        make_figure_*.R        # figure builders
        make_table_*.R         # table builders
        format_outputs.R       # display formatters
        replication_code.R     # get_code() for Shiny Code tab
        replication_api.R      # list_replications(), run_replication(), load_artifact()
        build_report.R         # write inst/report/artifacts/*
      inst/
        replication.yml        # installed copy (do not edit by hand)
        replication_code/      # installed copies of make_*/prep_*/format_outputs.R
        report/artifacts/        # precomputed outputs for Shiny Display

### R/ vs inst/replication_code/

`R/` is the **only place to edit** analysis code. Files under
`inst/replication_code/` are **generated copies** so
[`get_code()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/get_code.md)
can show source after `R CMD INSTALL` (installed packages do not ship
`R/`). Regenerate with:

``` bash
Rscript data-raw/sync_replication_code.R
```

Run this after changing any `make_*`, `prep_data*`, or
`format_outputs.R`, and before release. A test checks the copies stay in
sync.

`inst/replication.yml` is synced the same way from the package-root
`replication.yml`.

## Quick start

``` r

# from monorepo root
devtools::install("rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337")

library(rep1371journalpone0278337)
list_replications()
make_figure_1()
make_table_1()
```

[`build_report()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/build_report.md)
is only for **package release / CI** — it writes precomputed PNG/HTML
into `inst/report/artifacts/` so published installs serve fast Display.
Shiny runs replications live when artifacts are absent, so you do not
need this to use the app locally.

### Replication vignette (Quarto)

The main analysis is in `vignettes/vaccine-solidarity-replication.qmd`
(mirrors `vaccine_solidarity/analysis.Rmd` using one `make_*` script per
figure/table). Render locally:

``` bash
quarto render vignettes/vaccine-solidarity-replication.qmd
```

For a full HTML site including the vignette, run
[`pkgdown::build_site()`](https://pkgdown.r-lib.org/reference/build_site.html).
Tables and figures run live in the vignette (~10 seconds total). Run
[`build_report()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/build_report.md)
separately if you need precomputed Display artifacts for Shiny or
pkgdown.

## Data

Package data are built from CSV sources in `data-raw/`:

``` bash
Rscript data-raw/build_package_data.R
Rscript data-raw/sync_replication_code.R
```

To rebuild from raw survey export (requires `combined.csv` from
vaccine_solidarity):

``` r

prep_data("path/to/combined.csv")
```

## Tests

``` r

devtools::test("rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337")
```

## Registry integration

See `INTEGRATION.md`. Registry stub YAML uses:

- `paper.package_folder` — sibling folder name for local/monorepo use
- `paper.package_repo` — GitHub slug for online install once published

# Package index

## All functions

- [`amount_grids()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/amount_grids.md)
  : Cash and vaccine amount grids for cumulative support curves

- [`artifact_file()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/artifact_file.md)
  : Resolve path to a precomputed artifact file

- [`build_report()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/build_report.md)
  :

  Build all report artifacts into `inst/report/artifacts/`

- [`deal_labels`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/deal_labels.md)
  : Deal labels for wave 4 vignettes

- [`fit_marginal_effects()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/fit_marginal_effects.md)
  : Fit pooled marginal-effects models for cash and vaccine outcomes

- [`fit_marginal_effects_by()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/fit_marginal_effects_by.md)
  : Fit marginal-effects models split by a grouping variable

- [`format_figure_1()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_fig_1()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_figure_2()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_fig_2()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_figure_3()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_fig_3()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_figure_4()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_fig_4()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_figure_5()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_fig_5()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_figure_6()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_fig_6()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_figure_7()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_fig_7()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_figure_8()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  [`format_fig_8()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_figure_1.md)
  : Format a figure for display

- [`format_outputs`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_outputs.md)
  : Format replication outputs for display

- [`format_table_1()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_table_1.md)
  [`format_tab_1()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_table_1.md)
  : Format Table 1 for display

- [`format_table_2()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_table_2.md)
  [`format_tab_2()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/format_table_2.md)
  : Format Table 2 for display

- [`get_code()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/get_code.md)
  : Retrieve replication code for display

- [`list_replications()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/list_replications.md)
  :

  List available replications defined in `replication.yml`

- [`load_artifact()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/load_artifact.md)
  :

  Load a precomputed display artifact from `inst/report/artifacts/`

- [`make_figure_1()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_1.md)
  [`make_fig_1()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_1.md)
  : Figure 1 — distribution of support for contributions of different
  sizes

- [`make_figure_2()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_2.md)
  [`make_fig_2()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_2.md)
  : Figure 2 — marginal effects of conditions

- [`make_figure_3()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_3.md)
  [`make_fig_3()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_3.md)
  : Figure 3 — effect of video treatment on individual solidarity

- [`make_figure_4()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_4.md)
  [`make_fig_4()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_4.md)
  : Figure 4 — levels of support by party

- [`make_figure_5()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_5.md)
  [`make_fig_5()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_5.md)
  : Figure 5 — levels of support by migration background

- [`make_figure_6()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_6.md)
  [`make_fig_6()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_6.md)
  : Figure 6 — marginal effects of conditions by party

- [`make_figure_7()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_7.md)
  [`make_fig_7()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_7.md)
  : Figure 7 — marginal effects of conditions by migration background

- [`make_figure_8()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_8.md)
  [`make_fig_8()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_figure_8.md)
  : Figure 8 — results refreshment sample

- [`make_table_1()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_table_1.md)
  [`make_tab_1()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_table_1.md)
  : Table 1 — structural parameter estimates

- [`make_table_2()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_table_2.md)
  [`make_tab_2()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/make_table_2.md)
  : Table 2 — additional analyses (wave 2 conjoint)

- [`plot_marginal_effects()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/plot_marginal_effects.md)
  : Dot-and-whisker plot for marginal effects

- [`prep_data()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/prep_data.md)
  : Rebuild analysis datasets from the raw survey export

- [`prep_data_tab_2()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/prep_data_tab_2.md)
  : Reshape wave 2 conjoint tasks into long format for Table 2

- [`replication_meta()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/replication_meta.md)
  : Read package replication metadata

- [`run_replication()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/run_replication.md)
  : Run a named replication or prep step

- [`support_curve()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/support_curve.md)
  : Cumulative support curve

- [`treatment_terms()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/treatment_terms.md)
  : Main-effect terms for marginal-effects regressions

- [`vignette_labels`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/vignette_labels.md)
  : Vignette attribute labels for wave 2 conjoint tasks

- [`vignette_values()`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/vignette_values.md)
  : Vignette lookup table for wave 4 conjoint

- [`wave2_survey`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/wave2_survey.md)
  : Wave 2 survey data (video treatment and conjoint tasks)

- [`wave4_conjoint`](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/reference/wave4_conjoint.md)
  : Wave 4 conjoint experiment data (cash and vaccine contributions)

# Articles

### Replication vignette

Reproduce main tables and figures from inst/replication_code/

- [Vaccine solidarity
  replication](https://replicate-anything.github.io/rep-10.1371-journal.pone.0278337/articles/vaccine-solidarity-replication.md):
